classes.name: Market
classes.comment: Scope boundary for every query. One market per ontology in v1.

classes.name: Stage
classes.comment: A discrete step in a buyer's decision journey through a Market.

classes.name: StakeholderArchetype
classes.comment: A type of buyer, user, or decision-maker whose preferences shape a Market. The persona's traits are the HAS_TRAIT edge graph (StakeholderArchetype -[:HAS_TRAIT]-> Trait -[:HAS_LEVEL]-> TraitLevel) — there is no denormalized `traits` dict (removed in v1.5).

classes.name: Offering
classes.comment: A specific product or service a Company brings to a Market.

classes.name: Attribute
classes.comment: A dimension of an Offering that can be varied in an experiment.

classes.name: AttributeLevel
classes.comment: A plausible level for an Attribute in a Market/period.

classes.name: Trait
classes.comment: A dimension of a StakeholderArchetype used to describe a persona.

classes.name: TraitLevel
classes.comment: A plausible value for a Trait in a Market/period.

classes.name: Need
classes.comment: An outcome a StakeholderArchetype is trying to achieve in a Market — the job-to-be-done behind a Transition.

classes.name: Evidence
classes.comment: W3C PROV-O agent attribution for experiment-lineage nodes (v1.6).

classes.name: Company
classes.comment: The organization that offers one or more Offerings. Added in v1.1 to give Offering→Company a proper edge for rollup queries. Minimal props; add funding/size/industry in a later bump when a consumer needs them.

classes.name: ExperimentRun
classes.comment: Experiment execution record tying a snapshot to SuperEgo/W&B artifacts.

predicates.name: ABOUT
predicates.comment: Transition -[:ABOUT]-> Offering, or Estimate -[:ABOUT]-> any node.

predicates.name: OFFERED_BY
predicates.comment: Offering -[:OFFERED_BY]-> Company. Introduced in v1.1 as the programmatic rollup link. Consumers aggregating Attributes/Levels up to the Company level traverse this edge.
